channel.title: Nozomi Networks Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Nozomi Networks Inc. (nozomi).

item.title: CVE-2025-41281 · 7.5 HIGH
item.description: Nozomi Networks Labs identified a CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection') in Waterfall WF-500 RX Host in version 7.9.1.0 R2502171040 that allows attackers with access to the TX Host to execut…

item.title: CVE-2025-41280 · 7.5 HIGH
item.description: Nozomi Networks Labs identified a CWE-23: Relative Path Traversal (Zip Slip) in Waterfall WF-500 RX Host in version 7.9.1.0 R2502171040 that allows attackers with access to the TX Host to execute code on the RX Host when a MySQL connector is configur…

item.title: CVE-2025-41279 · 8.6 HIGH
item.description: Nozomi Networks Labs identified a CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection') in the Administration WebUI in Waterfall WF-500 RX Host in version 7.9.1.0 R2502171040 that allows remote authenticat…

item.title: CVE-2025-41278 · 7.5 HIGH
item.description: Nozomi Networks Labs identified a CWE-125: Out-of-bounds Read in Waterfall WF-500 RX Host in version 7.10.0.0 R2601141040 that allows attackers with access to the TX Host to execute code on the RX Host.

item.title: CVE-2025-41277 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Nozomi Networks Labs identified a CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection') in the Console WebUI in Waterfall WF-500 TX and RX Hosts in version 7.9.1.0 R2502171040 that allows remote unauthenti…

item.title: CVE-2025-41276 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Nozomi Networks Labs identified a CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection') in the Console WebUI in Waterfall WF-500 TX and RX Hosts in version 7.9.1.0 R2502171040 that allows remote unauthenti…

item.title: CVE-2025-41275 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Nozomi Networks Labs identified a CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection') in the Console WebUI in Waterfall WF-500 TX and RX Hosts in version 7.9.1.0 R2502171040 that allows remote unauthenti…

item.title: CVE-2025-41274 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Nozomi Networks Labs identified a CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection') in the Console WebUI in Waterfall WF-500 TX and RX Hosts in version 7.9.1.0 R2502171040 that allows remote unauthenti…

item.title: CVE-2025-41273 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Nozomi Networks Labs identified a CWE-288: Authentication Bypass Using an Alternate Path or Channel in the Console WebUI in Waterfall WF-500 TX and RX Hosts in version 7.9.1.0 R2502171040 that allows remote unauthenticated attackers to bypass authent…

item.title: CVE-2025-41272 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Nozomi Networks Labs identified a CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection') in the Console WebUI in Waterfall WF-500 TX and RX Hosts in version 7.9.1.0 R2502171040 that allows remote unauthenti…

item.title: CVE-2025-41271 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Nozomi Networks Labs identified a CWE-23: Relative Path Traversal in the Console WebUI in Waterfall WF-500 TX and RX Hosts in version 7.9.1.0 R2502171040 that allows remote unauthenticated attackers to read arbitrary files from the device.

item.title: CVE-2025-41270 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Nozomi Networks Labs identified a CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection') in the Console WebUI in Waterfall WF-500 TX and RX Hosts in version 7.9.1.0 R2502171040 that allows remote unauthenti…

item.title: CVE-2025-41269 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Nozomi Networks Labs identified a CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection') in the Console WebUI in Waterfall WF-500 TX and RX Hosts in version 7.9.1.0 R2502171040 that allows remote unauthenti…

item.title: CVE-2025-41268 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Nozomi Networks Labs identified a CWE-23: Relative Path Traversal in the Administration WebUI in Waterfall WF-500 TX and RX Hosts in version 7.9.1.0 R2502171040 that allows remote unauthenticated attackers to delete arbitrary files on the Host machin…

item.title: CVE-2025-41267 · 8.5 HIGH
item.description: Nozomi Networks Labs identified a CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection') in the Administration WebUI in Waterfall WF-500 TX Host in version 7.9.1.0 R2502171040 that allows remote authenticat…

item.title: CVE-2025-41266 · 8.6 HIGH
item.description: Nozomi Networks Labs identified a CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection') in the Administration WebUI in Waterfall WF-500 TX Host in version 7.9.1.0 R2502171040 that allows remote authenticat…

item.title: CVE-2025-41265 · 8.6 HIGH
item.description: Nozomi Networks Labs identified a CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection') in the Administration WebUI in Waterfall WF-500 TX Host in version 7.9.1.0 R2502171040 that allows remote authenticat…

item.title: CVE-2025-40904 · 6.5 MEDIUM — HTML injection in Smart Polling in Guardian/CMC before 26.1.0
item.description: A Stored HTML Injection vulnerability was discovered in the Smart Polling functionality due to improper validation of an input parameter. An authenticated user with limited privileges can push malicious remote strategies containing HTML tags through…

item.title: CVE-2025-40903 · 5.9 MEDIUM — HTML injection in Schedule Restore Archive in Guardian/CMC before 26.1.0
item.description: A Stored HTML Injection vulnerability was discovered in the Schedule Restore Archive functionality due to improper validation of an input parameter. An authenticated user with administrative privileges can define a malicious restore schedule containi…

item.title: CVE-2025-40902 · 5.9 MEDIUM — HTML injection in Users in Guardian/CMC before 26.1.0
item.description: A Stored HTML Injection vulnerability was discovered in the Users functionality due to improper validation of an input parameter. An authenticated user with administrative privileges can create a malicious user whose username contains HTML tags. When…

item.title: CVE-2025-40901 · 5.9 MEDIUM — HTML injection in Credentials Manager in Guardian/CMC before 26.1.0
item.description: A Stored HTML Injection vulnerability was discovered in the Credentials Manager functionality due to improper validation of an input parameter. An authenticated user with administrative privileges can define a malicious identity containing HTML tags.…

item.title: CVE-2025-40900 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Angular template injection in Reports in Guardian/CMC before 26.1.0
item.description: An Angular template injection vulnerability was discovered in the Reports functionality due to improper validation of an input parameter. An authenticated user with report privileges can define a malicious report containing an Angular template payloa…

item.title: CVE-2025-40899 · 8.9 HIGH — Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) in Assets and Nodes in Guardian/CMC before 26.0.0
item.description: A Stored Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability was discovered in the Assets and Nodes functionality due to improper validation of an input parameter. An authenticated user with custom fields privileges can define a malicious custom field containing a Ja…

item.title: CVE-2025-40897 · 8.1 HIGH — Incorrect authorization for Threat Intelligence in Guardian/CMC before 26.0.0
item.description: An access control vulnerability was discovered in the Threat Intelligence functionality due to a specific access restriction not being properly enforced for users with view-only privileges. An authenticated user with view-only privileges for the Thre…

item.title: CVE-2026-3588 · 7.5 HIGH — Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) in ikea dirigera
item.description: A server-side request forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in IKEA Dirigera v2.866.4 allows an attacker to exfiltrate private keys by sending a crafted request.

item.title: CVE-2025-40896 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Lack of TLS certificate validation when connecting Arc to a Guardian or CMC, in Arc before v2.2.0
item.description: The server certificate was not verified when an Arc agent connected to a Guardian or CMC. A malicious actor could perform a man-in-the-middle attack and intercept the communication between the Arc agent and the Guardian or CMC. This could result in t…

item.title: CVE-2025-40895 · 4.8 MEDIUM — HTML injection in Sensor Map in CMC before 25.6.0
item.description: A Stored HTML Injection vulnerability was discovered in the CMC's Sensor Map functionality due to improper validation on connected Guardians' properties. A malicious authenticated user with administrator privileges on a Guardian connected to a CMC ca…

item.title: CVE-2025-40894 · 4.4 MEDIUM — HTML injection in Alerted Nodes Dashboard in Guardian/CMC before 25.6.0
item.description: A Stored HTML Injection vulnerability was discovered in the Alerted Nodes Dashboard functionality due to improper validation on an input parameter. A malicious authenticated user with the required privileges could edit a node label to inject HTML tag…

item.title: CVE-2026-26102 · 8.5 HIGH — Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource in Owl opds
item.description: Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource in Owl opds 2.2.0.4 allows File Manipulation via a crafted network request.

item.title: CVE-2026-26101 · 8.5 HIGH — Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource in Owl opds
item.description: Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource in Owl opds 2.2.0.4 allows File Manipulation via a crafted network request.

item.title: CVE-2026-26100 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource in Owl opds
item.description: Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource in Owl opds 2.2.0.4 allows File Manipulation via a crafted network request.

item.title: CVE-2026-26099 · 8.4 HIGH — Uncontrolled Search Path Element in Owl opds
item.description: Uncontrolled Search Path Element in Owl opds 2.2.0.4 allows Leveraging/Manipulating Configuration File Search Paths via a crafted network request.

item.title: CVE-2026-26098 · 8.4 HIGH — Uncontrolled Search Path Element in Owl opds
item.description: Uncontrolled Search Path Element in Owl opds 2.2.0.4 allows Leveraging/Manipulating Configuration File Search Paths via a crafted network request.

item.title: CVE-2026-26097 · 8.4 HIGH — Uncontrolled Search Path Element in Owl opds
item.description: Uncontrolled Search Path Element in Owl opds 2.2.0.4 allows Leveraging/Manipulating Configuration File Search Paths via a crafted network request.

item.title: CVE-2026-26096 · 8.5 HIGH — Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource in Owl opds
item.description: Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource in Owl opds 2.2.0.4 allows File Manipulation via a crafted network request.

item.title: CVE-2026-26095 · 8.5 HIGH — Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource in Owl opds
item.description: Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource in Owl opds 2.2.0.4 allows File Manipulation via a crafted network request.

item.title: CVE-2026-26093 · 8.7 HIGH — Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Command ('Command Injection') in Owl opds
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Command ('Command Injection') in Owl opds 2.2.0.4 allows Command Injection via a crafted network request.

item.title: CVE-2026-2333 · 9.2 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Command ('Command Injection') in Owl opds
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Command ('Command Injection') in Owl opds 2.2.0.4 allows Command Injection via a crafted network request.

item.title: CVE-2025-40898 · 8.1 HIGH — Path traversal in Import Arc data archive functionality in Guardian/CMC before 25.5.0
item.description: A path traversal vulnerability was discovered in the Import Arc data archive functionality due to insufficient validation of the input file. An authenticated user with limited privileges, by uploading a specifically-crafted Arc data archive, can pote…

item.title: CVE-2025-40893 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — HTML injection in Asset List in Guardian/CMC before 25.5.0
item.description: A Stored HTML Injection vulnerability was discovered in the Asset List functionality due to improper validation of network traffic data. An unauthenticated attacker can send specially crafted network packets to inject HTML tags into asset attributes.…

item.title: CVE-2025-40892 · 8.9 HIGH — Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) in Reports in Guardian/CMC before 25.5.0
item.description: A Stored Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability was discovered in the Reports functionality due to improper validation of an input parameter. An authenticated user with report privileges can define a malicious report containing a JavaScript payload, or a…

item.title: CVE-2025-40891 · 4.7 MEDIUM 🌩️ — HTML injection in in Time Machine functionality in Guardian/CMC before 25.5.0
item.description: A Stored HTML Injection vulnerability was discovered in the Time Machine Snapshot Diff functionality due to improper validation of network traffic data. An unauthenticated attacker can send specially crafted network packets at two different times to…

item.title: CVE-2025-40890 · 7.9 HIGH — Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) in Dashboards in Guardian/CMC before 25.4.0
item.description: A Stored Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability was discovered in the Dashboards functionality due to improper validation of an input parameter. An authenticated low-privilege user can craft a malicious dashboard containing a JavaScript payload and share…

item.title: CVE-2025-11243 · 8.3 HIGH — Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling in Shelly Pro 4PM
item.description: Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling vulnerability in Shelly Pro 4PM (before v1.6) allows Excessive Allocation via network.

item.title: CVE-2025-12056 · 8.3 HIGH — Out-of-bounds Read in Shelly Pro 3EM
item.description: Out-of-bounds Read in Shelly Pro 3EM (before v1.4.4) allows Overread Buffers.

item.title: CVE-2025-11680 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Out-of-bounds Write in libwebsockets PNG parsing
item.description: Out-of-bounds Write in unfilter_scanline in warmcat libwebsockets allows, when the LWS_WITH_UPNG flag is enabled during compilation and the HTML display stack is used, to write past a heap allocated buffer possibly causing a crash, when the user visi…

item.title: CVE-2025-11679 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Out-of-bounds Read in libwebsockets PNG parsing
item.description: Out-of-bounds Read in lws_upng_emit_next_line in warmcat libwebsockets allows, when the LWS_WITH_UPNG flag is enabled during compilation and the HTML display stack is used, to read past a heap allocated buffer possibly causing a crash, when the user…

item.title: CVE-2025-11678 · 7.5 HIGH — Stack-based Buffer Overflow in libwebsockets DNS response parsing
item.description: Stack-based Buffer Overflow in lws_adns_parse_label in warmcat libwebsockets allows, when the LWS_WITH_SYS_ASYNC_DNS flag is enabled during compilation, to overflow the label_stack, when the attacker is able to sniff a DNS request in order to craft a…

item.title: CVE-2025-11677 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Use After Free in libwebsockets WebSocket server
item.description: Use After Free in WebSocket server implementation in lws_handshake_server in warmcat libwebsockets may allow an attacker, in specific configurations where the user provides a callback function that handles LWS_CALLBACK_HTTP_CONFIRM_UPGRADE, to achiev…

item.title: CVE-2025-40888 · 6 MEDIUM — Authenticated SQL Injection on CLI functionality in Guardian/CMC before 25.3.0
item.description: A SQL Injection vulnerability was discovered in the CLI functionality due to improper validation of an input parameter. An authenticated user with limited privileges can execute arbitrary SELECT SQL statements on the DBMS used by the web application,…
